creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 242237
"git diff" patch to update the port

- update 0.59 -> 0.60
Changes: https://github.com/mschout/Log-Log4perl-Layout-JSON/blob/master/Changes

- "portlint -AC" is happy.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- "portfmt -D Makefile" is happy.
- Tested with:
13.2-RELEASE
portlint 2.20.0
portfmt 1.1.4
pkg 1.19.1
poudriere 3.3.7_1
perl 5.32.1_3
openssl 1.1.1t
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
